items.title: Implement Jittered Lease Renewal Core
items.description: Develop the C++ core for randomized lease refresh offsets to eliminate thundering herds in Redis.

items.title: Probabilistic Early Refresh Logic
items.description: Add probabilistic logic to ensure only a subset of nodes hit the backing store under high contention.

items.title: FastAPI Sentinel Interceptor
items.description: Create the Python middleware that bridges FastAPI routes to the C++ Sentinel core.

items.title: Advanced Mode: Shared Memory with Seqlock
items.description: Implement the Versioned Generation Counter for lock-free co-located limiting.
